metadata_mapping.scene_title: og:title with trailing ' - ThisVid.com' removed, or page <title>
metadata_mapping.date: Public scene page 'Added:' text if present and parseable; otherwise omitted
metadata_mapping.description:
Scene description block
    first

    , else og:description
metadata_mapping.performers: Not populated from public pages because uploader/member links are not reliable performer metadata
metadata_mapping.tags: Categories plus tag links from the scene description block
metadata_mapping.studio: Not populated; site is community-upload focused
metadata_mapping.code: Hidden scene video ID from data-video-id or pageContext.videoId

search_strategy.notes: Search endpoint not confirmed during research; implement sceneByURL first.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: Slug-based URLs not suitable for title-based fragment matching.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: Site uses slug-based URLs; numeric-ID guessing returned 404.
Expect anti-bot or session constraints on rapid crawling.
Start discovery from listing pages rather than guessing video IDs.
Use browser-grade headers and introduce request delays.
known_limitations: Scene URL structure uses slugs, not numeric IDs — listing-first discovery is still useful.
Public pages expose uploader/member links more clearly than performer/model metadata, so performers are intentionally left blank.
Publish date is omitted when the anonymous scene HTML does not include a parseable Added date.
